title: ASICBoost
description: ASICBoost is a proof-of-work optimization that can reduce hashing cost under specific block-construction strategies. Its deployment affects miner incentives, transparency, and template policy debates.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: ASICBoost
resources.notes: Historical and technical context for overt and covert ASICBoost.
